queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default and credit risk drivers associated with borrowers lacking a formal checking account.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: less than 1 year.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default and credit risk drivers associated with borrowers having less than one year of continuous employment duration.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of radio or TV.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating determinants and credit risk drivers associated with loan purposes designated for the purchase of consumer electronics such as radios and televisions.
